noteflightScore.title: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared 1-6
noteflightScore.composer: Transcribed by Martin He Made by This is It Productions

expression.text: Now when you stare at the clouds in the sky, don't you find it exciting. NO.
Come on, take another look. OH WAIT,
I can see a hat, I can see a cat, I can see a man with a baseball bat.
I can see a dog, I can see a frog, I can see a ladder, leaning on a log.
Come on guys, let's get creative!
Come on guys stop mucking around. We only have 5 minutes until our show's on. That's not enough time. There's always time for a song!
Time is a tool you can put on the wall or wear it on your wrist.
The past is far behind us, the future doesn't exist.
What's the time? It's quarter to 9, time to have a bath.
Music from Don't Hug Me I'm Scared
